raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against Barclays for prematurely closing my billing dispute ( Case ID : XXXX ) regarding a {$940.00} charge from merchant XXXX XXXX ( p. XXXX ). Barclays closed the case because I failed to respond to a XXXX merchant rebuttal notice. However, due to an incorrect billing address on file, I never received this physical letter. 

I possess conclusive proof of a fully completed return that customer service refuses to accept or manually review. The merchant provided a void return label ( XXXX XXXX # XXXX ) ( p. XXXX ). I attempted a return on XX/XX/year>, which was returned to me due to an address error by the merchant ( pp. XXXX, XXXX ). After sending unacknowledged emails to verify the address, I shipped the package again on XX/XX/year>, via XXXX Tracking # XXXX ( pp. XXXX, XXXX ). This return package was successfully delivered directly to the merchant 's location in XXXX, VT, on XX/XX/year> ( pp. XXXX, XXXX ). 

The merchant has been in possession of the returned merchandise since XX/XX/year>, but has ignored multiple refund inquiries ( p. XXXX ). Because I successfully returned the items, Barclays ' refusal to reopen this dispute and evaluate my tracking evidence violates my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). I request that Barclays escalate this file to an executive analyst to manually process my credit.
